## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (if frontend changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` or release section
- [ ] Version bumped in `backend/version.py` and `python3 scripts/sync_version.py` run (if releasing)
- [ ] No secrets, passwords, or API keys committed
- [ ] Backwards compatible API (or migration documented)
